subject: F14: Bundle MSTYLE_FAMILY_INDEX globals into Context
description: Deferred. Wrapping module-level globals (MSTYLE_FAMILY_INDEX, CUST_BASELINE_INDEX, GLOBAL_WK_RATE) into a Context dataclass touches every read site (~30+ locations). Without unit tests, refactor risk exceeds payoff. The 2026-05-21 fix that populates these before validation already addresses the specific known failure mode. Revisit when a Context refactor is part of a wider design pass.
